name: Pumpkin Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the juice, raisins, and figs in a bowl. Let stand for 1 hour or overnight.
2. Beat together the pumpkin, sugar, and oil. Stir in the fruit mixture.
3. Add the flour, baking soda, baking powder, spices, nuts, and orange rind. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 8 x 5 inch loaf pan.
5. Bake in an oven set to 325°F for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and let cool thoroughly on a wire rack before serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
